title: Yasna 51: Zoroaster's Lament
description: The prophet's personal lament: surrounded by enemies, he asks Ahura Mazda when righteousness will prevail.
introduction: The prophet's personal lament: surrounded by enemies, he asks Ahura Mazda when righteousness will prevail.

translation.original_text: kaθā tōi Mazdā zaraθuštrō stūtąm dāidīt
translation.text: How, O Mazda, shall Zoroaster offer praise to you?
